import api from'./api';const CMS_API_BASE='/admin';export const cmsService={// Pages
async getPages(){const response=await api.get(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages`);return response.data;},async createPage(data){const response=await api.post(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages`,data);return response.data;},async updatePage(id,data){const response=await api.put(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${id}`,data);return response.data;},async deletePage(id){const response=await api.delete(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${id}`);return response.data;},// Sections
async createSection(pageId,data){const response=await api.post(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${pageId}/sections`,data);return response.data;},async updateSection(id,data){const response=await api.put(`${CMS_API_BASE}/sections/${id}`,data);return response.data;},async deleteSection(id){const response=await api.delete(`${CMS_API_BASE}/sections/${id}`);return response.data;},// Cards
async createCard(sectionId,data){const response=await api.post(`${CMS_API_BASE}/sections/${sectionId}/cards`,data);return response.data;},async updateCard(id,data){const response=await api.put(`${CMS_API_BASE}/cards/${id}`,data);return response.data;},async deleteCard(id){const response=await api.delete(`${CMS_API_BASE}/cards/${id}`);return response.data;},// Public pages
async getPublicPage(slug){const response=await api.get(`/pages/${slug}`);return response.data;},// Get page with all sections and cards
async getPageWithSections(pageId){const response=await api.get(`${CMS_API_BASE}/pages/${pageId}`);return response.data;}};export default cmsService;
